title: Square Order
description: Contains all information related to a single order to process with Square, including line items that specify the products to purchase. Order objects also include information about any associated tenders, refunds, and returns.

location_id.description: The ID of the seller location that this order is associated with.

reference_id.description: A client-specified ID to associate an entity in another system with this order.

source.description: The origination details of the order.

name.description: The name used to identify the place (application, device, etc.) that created the order.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer associated with the order.

uid.description: A unique ID that identifies the line item only within this order.

name.description: The name of the line item.

quantity.description: The quantity purchased, as a string representation of a number.

catalog_object_id.description: The catalog object ID for the item or item variation.

catalog_version.description: The version of the catalog object that this line item references.

variation_name.description: The name of the variation applied to this line item.

note.description: The note of the line item.

base_price_money.description: The base price for a single unit of the line item.

gross_sales_money.description: The gross sales amount of money calculated as (item base price) * quantity.

total_tax_money.description: The total tax amount of money to collect for the line item.

total_discount_money.description: The total discount amount of money to collect for the line item.

total_money.description: The total amount of money to collect for this line item.

tax_uid.description: The uid of the tax for which this applied tax represents.

applied_money.description: The amount of money applied by the tax to the line item.

applied_taxes.description: The list of taxes applied to this line item.

discount_uid.description: The uid of the discount for which this applied discount represents.

applied_money.description: The amount of money applied by the discount to the line item.

applied_discounts.description: The list of discounts applied to this line item.

item_type.description: The type of line item: an itemized sale, a non-itemized sale, or a custom amount.

metadata.description: Application-defined data attached to this line item.

line_items.description: The line items included in the order.

uid.description: A unique ID that identifies the tax only within this order.

catalog_object_id.description: The catalog object ID referencing a CatalogTax.

type.description: Indicates the calculation method used to apply the tax.

percentage.description: The percentage of the tax, as a string representation of a decimal number.

scope.description: Indicates whether the tax is scoped to the entire order or a single line item.

applied_money.description: The amount of money applied by the tax in the order.

taxes.description: The list of all taxes associated with the order.

uid.description: A unique ID that identifies the discount only within this order.

catalog_object_id.description: The catalog object ID referencing a CatalogDiscount.

percentage.description: The percentage of the discount, as a string representation of a decimal number.

amount_money.description: The fixed amount of the discount.

applied_money.description: The amount of money applied by the discount in the order.

scope.description: Indicates whether the discount is scoped to the entire order or a single line item.

discounts.description: The list of all discounts associated with the order.

uid.description: A unique ID that identifies the service charge only within this order.

name.description: The name of the service charge.

catalog_object_id.description: The catalog object ID referencing the service charge.

percentage.description: The service charge percentage as a string representation of a decimal number.

amount_money.description: The amount of a non-percentage-based service charge.

total_money.description: The total amount of money to collect for the service charge.

service_charges.description: A list of service charges applied to the order.

uid.description: A unique ID that identifies the fulfillment only within this order.

state.description: The current state of the fulfillment.

items.description: A collection of items from sale orders being returned.

returns.description: A collection of items from sale orders being returned in this one.

return_amounts.description: The rollup of the returned money amounts.

net_amounts.description: The net money amounts (sale money - return money).

rounding_adjustment.description: A positive rounding adjustment to the total of the order.

items.description: A tender represents a payment method used in a transaction.

tenders.description: The tenders that were used to pay for the order.

items.description: A refund associated with the order.

refunds.description: The refunds that are part of this order.

metadata.description: Application-defined data attached to this order. Metadata fields are intended to store descriptive references or associations with an entity in another system.

created_at.description: The timestamp for when the order was created, in RFC 3339 format.

updated_at.description: The timestamp for when the order was last updated, in RFC 3339 format.

closed_at.description: The timestamp for when the order reached a terminal state, in RFC 3339 format.

state.description: The current state of the order.

version.description: The version number, incremented each time an update is committed to the order.

total_money.description: The total amount of money to collect for the order.

total_tax_money.description: The total amount of tax money to collect for the order.

total_discount_money.description: The total amount of discount money to collect for the order.

total_tip_money.description: The total amount of tip money to collect for the order.

total_service_charge_money.description: The total amount of service charge money to collect for the order.

ticket_name.description: A short-term identifier for the order used on receipts, the Seller Dashboard, and the Point of Sale device.
